name: Troubleshoot problems updating Windows | Microsoft Support
snippet: Select Start > Settings > System. Select Troubleshoot and choose Other troubleshooters. Locate Windows Update and select Run. Follow the on-screen instructions ...

name: Windows 10 Settings menu: The Update & security tab - CNET
snippet:
